name: Draw Missing Part
shortDescription: Think smart, draw once, and fix the scene! Draw Missing Part is a fun and creative puzzle game where your job is to draw the missing part to complete funny and unexpected situations.
fullDescription:
Each level shows a strange, broken, or incomplete scene. Use your finger to draw the one missing piece, and watch the story come alive with hilarious results!

✏️ HOW TO PLAY

  • Look at the picture carefully
  • Find what part is missing
  • Draw one simple line or shape
  • Solve the puzzle and enjoy the funny outcome

Sounds easy? Some puzzles will really test your logic and creativity 😉

🧠 FEATURES

  • ✔️ Simple one-line drawing gameplay
  • ✔️ Funny and surprising puzzle scenes
  • ✔️ Brain-training logic puzzles
  • ✔️ Easy to play, hard to master
  • ✔️ No drawing skills needed
  • ✔️ Relaxing and stress-free gameplay
  • ✔️ Perfect for all ages
